summary: Plan-mode inventory classification only. No GitHub mutations are planned beyond non-mutating classifications; security-sensitive PR #88935 is routed to central security handling. The shard has no shared canonical, so open non-security PRs are kept independent unless already closed or blocked by draft/review status.
